name: Patrick
profile:
A holy knight from the empire, who specializes in spears.
He has a courage to charge alone into battle.

name: Grace
profile:
A cloak-and-dagger specialist in spells and archery.
She is a sisterly woman but has a weakness for alcohol.

name: Gilbert
profile:
A heavy warrior who handles a huge battle axe with ease.
He sees Sydney as his rival.

name: Ellen
profile:
She is a gifted student at the Institute of Magic.
She pretends a bewitching woman but is a maiden in love.

name: Anastasia
profile:
A traveling dancer who fights with a dagger.
She raises the abilities of her allies through dances.

name: Rufus
profile:
He is an engineer who handles a weapon called Magic Gun.
He is not good at socializing, but is skilled at fighting.

name: Reid
profile:
A hero in many stories.
He fights with automatic actions for 3 turns.

name: Maximilian
profile:
Royal Guard excelling in friend support.
He fights with automatic actions.

name: Zoe
profile:
Royal Guard adept at hindering enemies.
She fights with automatic actions.
